headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -62.6)
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 54% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 113 quotes, including 83 at strong intensity - people are expressing anger and annoyance very forcefully today.

• The frustration score of 46.7 sits in the middle range for the 95-day period, showing typical levels of discontent.

• Frustrations cooled from yesterday's high of 67.7, while fears improved slightly and optimism worsened further into negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
